name: curate
description: Curation planner (workflow plane): make raw data standardized and self-describing. The v1 skill is annotate — complete dataset_description.json, generate a participants.json data dictionary, fill BIDS sidecars, and optionally map variables to controlled terms (Neurobagel/SNOMED/NIDM/ReproSchema). Metadata edits are provenanced via the datalad doer.
